---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with Company Supplier to help us fix it
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

> ⚠️ **Stable branch only.** Company Supplier is built and tested against the
> **stable** release of Captain of Industry (currently `0.8.5.0`). Bugs that only
> occur on the **experimental** branch will be closed — the mod is not updated in
> response to experimental updates.
>
> This is a **singleplayer** cheat tool that deliberately bypasses the game's
> economy. Please back up your save before reporting save-corruption issues.

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Affected tab / feature**
Which part of the F8 menu is involved?
- [ ] Resources
- [ ] General
- [ ] Generation
- [ ] Shipyard & Fleet
- [ ] Vehicles
- [ ] Terrain
- [ ] Weather
- [ ] The menu itself (won't open, won't load, crashes on open, etc.)

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behaviour:
1. Press **F8** to open the menu
2. Go to the '...' tab
3. Click / set '...'
4. See error

**Expected behaviour**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots of the menu and/or the in-game result to help explain your problem.

**Logs (required for crashes)**
Please attach the log file from:
`%USERPROFILE%\Documents\Captain of Industry\Logs`
Drag-and-drop the file directly into the issue, or paste the relevant lines in a code block.

**Environment**
 - Game version (must be stable): [e.g. 0.8.5.0]
 - Game branch: [stable / experimental]
 - Company Supplier version: [e.g. 1.0.0 — see manifest.json or the release you downloaded]
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
 - Other mods installed: [list them, or "none" — needed to rule out conflicts]

**Save file**
Does it happen on a fresh save, an existing save, or both? Attaching the affected
save (zipped) makes reproduction much faster.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here — e.g. does it happen every time or
only sometimes, did it start after a specific game/mod update, etc.
